---
title: "Mybatis拦截器Interceptor"
description: ""
badge: "开发随笔"
date: 2022-12-17
tags: ["开发"]
archive: true
draft: false
slug: mybatis-interceptor
---
# Mybatis拦截器Interceptor

# 一、 需求

因为存在公共数据【创建人姓名（create_by）、创建时间（create_time）、编辑人姓名（update_by）、最后编辑时间（update_time）等】，在新增修改时候需要自动赋值。

数据库持久层框架使用的是 **MyBatis**，我们可以使用 **MyBatis** 的 拦截器（**Interceptor**）来实现此功能。

# 二、 实现

## 1. 定义一个基类（BaseDo）

```java
package com.yang.time.is.silent.dal;

import java.io.Serializable;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;

/**
 * 数据库基类
 *
 * @author : 未见清海
 * @date : 2022/6/29
 */
public class BaseDo implements Serializable {

    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1305765628460346880L;

    /**
     * 创建者id
     */
    private Long createBy;

    /**
     * 创建时间
     */
    private LocalDateTime createTime;

    /**
     * 更新者id
     */
    private Long updateBy;

    /**
     * 更新时间
     */
    private LocalDateTime updateTime;

    public Long getCreateBy() {
        return createBy;
    }

    public void setCreateBy(Long createBy) {
        this.createBy = createBy;
    }

    public LocalDateTime getCreateTime() {
        return createTime;
    }

    public void setCreateTime(LocalDateTime createTime) {
        this.createTime = createTime;
    }

    public Long getUpdateBy() {
        return updateBy;
    }

    public void setUpdateBy(Long updateBy) {
        this.updateBy = updateBy;
    }

    public LocalDateTime getUpdateTime() {
        return updateTime;
    }

    public void setUpdateTime(LocalDateTime updateTime) {
        this.updateTime = updateTime;
    }

    @Override
    public String toString() {
        return "BaseDo{" +
                "createBy='" + createBy + '\'' +
                ", createTime=" + createTime +
                ", updateBy='" + updateBy + '\'' +
                ", updateTime=" + updateTime +
                '}';
    }
}

```

## 2. 自定义 Mybatis 拦截器(BaseDoInterceptor)

```java
package com.yang.time.is.silent.config;

import com.yang.time.is.silent.dal.BaseDo;
import org.apache.ibatis.executor.Executor;
import org.apache.ibatis.mapping.MappedStatement;
import org.apache.ibatis.mapping.SqlCommandType;
import org.apache.ibatis.plugin.*;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;

import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.Objects;
import java.util.Properties;

/**
 * mybatis的拦截器
 *
 * @author : 未见清海
 */
@Component
@Intercepts({
        @Signature(type = Executor.class, method = "update", args = {MappedStatement.class, Object.class})
})
public class BaseDoInterceptor implements Interceptor {

    @Override
    public Object intercept(Invocation invocation) throws Throwable {
        MappedStatement mappedStatement = (MappedStatement) invocation.getArgs()[0];
        Object parameter = invocation.getArgs()[1];
        if (parameter instanceof BaseDo) {
            // 获取当前登录人员
//            Object principal = SecurityContextHolder.getContext().getAuthentication().getPrincipal();
            Long currentUsername = 123L;
//            if (principal instanceof UserDetailsImpl) {
//                UserDetailsImpl userDetails = (UserDetailsImpl) principal;
//                currentUsername = userDetails.getUsername();
//            }
            BaseDo baseDo = (BaseDo) parameter;
            // 自动赋值
            if (Objects.equals(SqlCommandType.INSERT, mappedStatement.getSqlCommandType())) {
                baseDo.setCreateBy(currentUsername);
                baseDo.setCreateTime(LocalDateTime.now());
                baseDo.setUpdateBy(currentUsername);
                baseDo.setUpdateTime(LocalDateTime.now());
            } else if (Objects.equals(SqlCommandType.UPDATE, mappedStatement.getSqlCommandType())) {
                baseDo.setUpdateBy(currentUsername);
                baseDo.setUpdateTime(LocalDateTime.now());
            }
        }
        return invocation.proceed();
    }

    @Override
    public Object plugin(Object target) {
        return Plugin.wrap(target, this);
    }

    @Override
    public void setProperties(Properties properties) {
//        Interceptor.super.setProperties(properties);
    }

}

```

## 3. 拦截器配置

在 MyBatis 的配置文件里配置自定义拦截器：

```xml
<plugins>
    <plugin interceptor="com.yang.time.is.silent.config.BaseDoInterceptor" />
</plugins>

```

还有一种方法是在 **BaseDoInterceptor** 类上加一个 **@Component** 注解 （推荐）

# 三、 问题

## 1. yml配置问题

除了可以在配置文件中配置，还可以直接在yml中进行配置

```yaml
# mybatis 配置内容
mybatis:
  configuration:
      interceptors: {com.yang.time.is.silent.config.Base EntityInterceptor}

```

**interceptors** 需要的是一个 `List<Interceptor>` 对象

这种方式不好使（?）

## 2. 导包问题

### 1） 报错

```java
2022-12-27 17:05:09.338 ERROR 16272 --- [nio-9000-exec-1] o.a.c.c.C.[.[.[/].[dispatcherServlet]    : Servlet.service() for servlet [dispatcherServlet] in context with path [] threw exception [Request processing failed; nested exception is org.apache.ibatis.exceptions.PersistenceException:
### Error opening session.  Cause: org.apache.ibatis.plugin.PluginException: Could not find method on interface java.util.concurrent.Executor named update. Cause: java.lang.NoSuchMethodException: java.util.concurrent.Executor.update(org.apache.ibatis.mapping.MappedStatement, java.lang.Object)
### Cause: org.apache.ibatis.plugin.PluginException: Could not find method on interface java.util.concurrent.Executor named update. Cause: java.lang.NoSuchMethodException: java.util.concurrent.Executor.update(org.apache.ibatis.mapping.MappedStatement, java.lang.Object)] with root cause

java.lang.NoSuchMethodException: java.util.concurrent.Executor.update(org.apache.ibatis.mapping.MappedStatement, java.lang.Object)
	at java.lang.Class.getMethod(Class.java:1786) ~[na:1.8.0_341]
	at org.apache.ibatis.plugin.Plugin.getSignatureMap(Plugin.java:81) ~[mybatis-3.5.7.jar:3.5.7]
	at org.apache.ibatis.plugin.Plugin.wrap(Plugin.java:45) ~[mybatis-3.5.7.jar:3.5.7]
	at com.yang.time.is.silent.config.BaseDoInterceptor.plugin(BaseDoInterceptor.java:55) ~[classes/:na]
	at org.apache.ibatis.plugin.InterceptorChain.pluginAll(InterceptorChain.java:31) ~[mybatis-3.5.7.jar:3.5.7]
	at org.apache.ibatis.session.Configuration.newExecutor(Configuration.java:681) ~[mybatis-3.5.7.jar:3.5.7]
	at org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSessionFactory.openSessionFromDataSource(DefaultSqlSessionFactory.java:96) ~[mybatis-3.5.7.jar:3.5.7]
	at org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSessionFactory.openSession(DefaultSqlSessionFactory.java:57) ~[mybatis-3.5.7.jar:3.5.7]
	at org.mybatis.spring.SqlSessionUtils.getSqlSession(SqlSessionUtils.java:105) ~[mybatis-spring-2.0.6.jar:2.0.6]

```

### 2） 原因

导入了java.util的包

![image-11](./assets/image-11.png)

![](data:image/png;base64,)

### 3） 修改

把导入修改为 ibatis的

![image-12](./assets/image-12.png)

![](data:image/png;base64,)
